seoTitle: Canning Vale vs Cannington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Canning Vale and Cannington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Canning Vale vs Cannington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canning Vale and Cannington.
heading: Canning Vale vs Cannington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canning Vale, Western Australia and Cannington, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canning Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Cannington (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canning Vale or Cannington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canning Vale has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Cannington scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canning Vale scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Cannington scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canning Vale or Cannington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canning Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
